title: paul russells 4ft LED Batten Light, LED Tube Light 30W 3000lm, Ceiling Lighting Cool White 4000K, LED Garage Lighting, Office Ceiling Lights, Workshop & Shed Light, Fluorescent Replacement

description: Product Description Easy and Swift Installation Save time with included mounting brackets for easy installation of LED battens on walls or ceilings, with no need for fixing tube lights to fixtures. Both provide excellent illumination for any room while protecting your eyes with non-flickering lights. WIDE ANGLE LIGHT DISTRIBUTION The 120° wide angle beam promising better light distribution, super brightness and no flickering lighting. With innovative British design and the latest chips, these lights are also incredibly energy-efficient, making them a smart and sustainable lighting solution. Experience the advantages of contemporary LED technology with these innovative integrated batten tube lights. Enjoy exceptional illumination while reducing your energy consumption with these innovative LED lights. So, Don't waste more time and brighten up your home today. So, it's important to make sure your workspace is well-lit to help you stay alert and efficient throughout the day.
